CustomField.description: This formula field calculates the available balance on payment studio record. If the Approval status is Cancelled or Declined the balance will be Zero. Used when multi-currency is enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula field calculates the available balance on payment studio record. If the Approval status is Cancelled or Declined the balance will be Zero. Used when multi-currency is enabled.
CustomField.label: Available Balance
